channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Trump, Vance call for clean CR, debt ceiling hike; urge GOP to sink Johnson compromise
item.description: President-elect Trump and Vice President-elect J.D. Vance on Wednesday called for Republicans to approve a clean stopgap funding bill paired with a hike to the debt ceiling, saying the previous government-funding measure negotiated by Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) should be torpedoed.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: 2 pilots die in fiery small plane crash into vacant building near Honolulu airport
item.description: Shortly after taking off from Honolulu's Daniel K. Inouye International Airport, two pilots were killed when their small plane on a training flight crashed into a vacant building.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Government funding plan collapses as Trump makes new demands
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump abruptly rejected a bipartisan plan Wednesday to prevent a Christmastime government shutdown, instead telling House Speaker Mike Johnson and Republicans to essentially renegotiate — days before a deadline when federal funding runs out.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO and KEVIN FREKING, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Social Security bill clears first hurdle in Senate
item.description: The Senate voted 73-27 to advance the measure, which could mean higher Social Security benefits for some Americans if passed before Congress leaves this week.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Chicago White Sox stadium getting a new name for the 2025 season
item.description: The home stadium of the Chicago White Sox won't be called Guaranteed Rate Field come the start of the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, KREX 5

item.title: College hockey player sued by opponent over injury she suffered on the ice
item.description: The lawsuit claims an illegal hit from Crawford during a game on Feb. 19, 2023, has caused her serious long-term issues.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, NewsNation

item.title: Grammy award-winning gospel singer arrested in South Carolina
item.description: The City of Greenville confirmed that Johnson was charged with public intoxication and an open container on a public street.
item.dc:creator: Nikolette Miller, NewsNation

item.title: US effort to curb China's and Russia's access to advanced computer chips 'inadequate,' report finds
item.description: The U.S. Commerce Department’s efforts to curb China’s and Russia’s access to American-made advanced computer chips have been “inadequate” and will need more funding to stymie their ability to manufacture advanced weapons.
item.dc:creator: Aamer Madhani And Josh Boak, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Rescuers dig for survivors of Vanuatu earthquake with no water and unclear death toll
item.description: WELLINGTON, New Zealand (AP) — Vanuatu's capital was without water on Wednesday, a day after reservoirs were destroyed by a violent magnitude 7.3 earthquake that wrought havoc on the South Pacific island nation, with the number of people killed and injured expected to rise.
item.dc:creator: CHARLOTTE GRAHAM-McLAY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mystery drone sightings continue in New Jersey and across the US. Here's what we know
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (AP) — A large number of mysterious drones have been reported flying over New Jersey and across the eastern U.S., sparking speculation and concern over where they came from and why.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Florida pursues charge against suspect in Trump assassination attempt for a crash after his arrest
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Florida authorities announced Wednesday that they're pursuing a criminal case against a man accused of trying to assassinate President-elect Donald Trump for a car crash that occurred after law enforcement stopped traffic to catch him.
item.dc:creator: KATE PAYNE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: New charges target ex-Miami congressman for lobbying on behalf of sanctioned Venezuelan tycoon
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — A federal grand jury in Washington has returned an indictment against former Congressman David Rivera for failing to register as a foreign agent of a sanctioned Venezuelan media tycoon on whose behalf the Miami Republican allegedly lobbied the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: JOSHUA GOODMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Pentagon transfers out 3 Guantanamo Bay detainees
item.description: Three Guantanamo Bay detainees were transferred out of Cuba this week to Malaysia and Kenya, the Pentagon announced, leaving 27 remaining at the facility.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gov. Andy Beshear says Democrats should set partisanship aside, work to meet people's needs
item.description: Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear says Democrats should think less about partisan politics and more about meeting people’s needs.
item.dc:creator: Bruce Schreiner, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Charlotte Hornets apologize after PS5 taken from 13-year-old during on-court giveaway
item.description: What was supposed to be a festive "skit" during the Charlotte Hornets game against the Philadelphia 76ers on Monday ended up earning the Hornets ‘Grinch’-like jeers on social media.
item.dc:creator: Ciara Lankford, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 184-foot floating Christmas tree collapses, killing 21-year-old man
item.description: A 21-year-old man was killed when a 184-foot floating Christmas tree collapsed in Brazil earlier this week. The incident occurred on Monday in the city of Maricá, which is located roughly 25 miles east of Rio de Janeiro.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Paxton files motion to block auction of border wall materials
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton filed a motion Tuesday to stop the sale of pieces of the border wall.
item.dc:creator: Abigail Jones, NewsNation

item.title: 1,000 toys dropped off for patients at Bronson Children's Hospital
item.description: The hospital will set up holiday workshops where families with patients in the hospital can shop for toys to give to their kids.
item.dc:creator: Nick Ponton, NewsNation

item.title: Louisiana patient has first severe bird flu case in US: health officials
item.description: Human cases of bird flu have been reported in the U.S. before, but infections were mild in those patients.
item.dc:creator: Trinity Velazquez, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US Postal Service warns of 'smishing,' other holiday scams: What to know
item.description: “While the holiday season offers merriment, joy, and togetherness, fraudsters and their scams can dim the season,” the Postal Service’s federal law enforcement arm warned.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Supreme Court takes up challenge to TikTok ban
item.description: The Supreme Court announced it will take up whether a law that could ban TikTok nationwide violates the First Amendment, setting the stage for a fast-paced, high-stakes battle over free speech.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Here's why Trump’s hush money judge rebuffed the immunity claim
item.description: President-elect Trump suffered a major loss in his bid to toss his New York criminal conviction when a judge ruled Monday that the guilty verdict withstands the Supreme Court’s presidential immunity ruling.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: Business partner of missing Suzanne Simpson's murder suspect husband arrested, indicted after texts emerge
item.description: James "Val" Cotter was indicted by a grand jury this week in the case of missing Texas mom and realtor Suzanne Simpson, who disappeared near San Antonio.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rear seat belt reminders to be required in 2027
item.description: NHTSA estimated the new rule will prevent more than 500 injuries and save about 50 lives each year if and when it's fully implemented.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Scientists find 'forever chemicals' lurking in certain smartwatch wristbands
item.description: Prior research has shown that more than a fifth of Americans wear a smartwatch or a fitness tracker — and they do so for extended periods of time.
item.dc:creator: Sharon Udasin, KRON4

item.title: GOP report recommends Liz Cheney be criminally investigated over Jan. 6 work
item.description: It’s a claim that if pursued would likely face significant roadblocks but that nonetheless comes as Trump has suggested members of the Jan. 6 panel should “go to jail” for their work.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, Fox 5

item.title: NASA astronauts Suni Williams and Butch Wilmore, already stuck in space, are hit with new delay
item.description: Astronauts Suni Williams and Butch Wilmore, the crew of the first manned Boeing Starliner launch in early June, were initially meant to spend only about eight days in space.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Over 500,000 winter tires recalled due to poor traction in snow
item.description: A tire company that sells winter tires has issued a recall for more than 540,000 of its snow tires, which do not comply with North American standards due to lack of proper traction on snow.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Electoral College formally votes to confirm Trump's win
item.description: President-elect Trump has clinched the necessary number of Electoral College votes to become the next occupant of the White House, teeing up the official certification of his victory before Congress next month.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump names Herschel Walker as ambassador to Bahamas
item.description: Trump had quipped before Election Day that he would put Walker in charge of a new missile defense shield if elected.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Drones spotted over Camp Pendleton in California posed no threat to operations: report
item.description: Officials at Marine Corps Base Camp Pendleton in California reportedly said there were six drones detected in its airspace last week, though none posed a threat to operations.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Democrats divided over Biden administration response to reported drone sightings
item.description: The Biden administration’s response to mounting public concern over alleged drone sightings in the Northeast is dividing Democrats on Capitol Hill, where some lawmakers are defending the executive assurances that there’s no threat to public safety and others are bashing the various agencies for not
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, WFLA, NBC
